answer.text: Any time before or on the expiration date
Only within the first week of the contract
At any time during the contract period, with notice

explanation.text: **The Logic:** European options can be exercised ONLY on the expiration date. American options can be exercised any time on or before expiration. All exchange-traded currency options in India are European style. **The Trap:** European options CAN be sold in the secondary market before expiry (to square off), even though exercise is only at expiry. **Cross-Exam Context:** Option styles are tested in Series I and VIII. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** American options are always priced >= European options (all else equal) because of the additional flexibility of early exercise.
